Auto-generated daily at 9 AM IST. Listing type: Fitment/Installation is exclusive to us (no other seller can offer it) so its win rate should ideally be 100% - flagged red if not, which usually means a hijacker or unauthorized reseller. Only Delivery listings are ones where we're currently the only seller with an offer - also expected near 100%. Latched On listings share the ASIN with other sellers, so real competition is expected there.
